description_long: This object consists of two AK-style rifles, each featuring a classic wooden stock and handguard, with one rifle finished in a gold metallic color and the other in matte black. Both rifles have a curved detachable box magazine, a prominent front sight post, and a gas tube above the barrel. The gold rifle has a shiny, reflective receiver, while the black rifle has a more subdued, matte finish. The wooden components are a reddish-brown color, contrasting with the metal parts. The rifles are detailed with visible trigger guards, charging handles, and iron sights, making them visually realistic and recognizable as iconic assault rifles.
description: A pair of AK-style rifles, one gold and one black, with wooden stocks and curved magazines. Both feature detailed metal and wood textures, iron sights, and classic AK design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing both rifles' full profiles, highlighting the gold and black finishes, wooden stocks, and curved magazines.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profiles, barrel alignment, and the difference in receiver finishes between the two rifles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the rifles, with clear visibility of the stocks, magazines, and metallic surfaces.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the undercarriage, trigger guards, and the alignment of the magazines and stocks.
